message.content:
Here are the available tools you can use:

- functions.search_code
  - Description: Search code.
  - Signature: () => any
  - Parameters: none (no inputs)

- multi_tool_use.parallel
  - Description: Run multiple tools in parallel. Use this to invoke several tools at once.
  - Signature: (parameters) => any
  - Parameters format: {
      tool_uses: [
        { recipient_name: "functions.<tool_name>", parameters: { ... } },
        ...
      ]
    }
  - Notes: Only tools from the functions namespace may be used inside the parallel wrapper.

Would you like me to run a quick code search, or demonstrate a parallel call using these tools?
